description: hex MCP tool definitions — installed into target projects by `hex init`. Single source of truth for CLI, MCP server, and SpacetimeDB sync.

tools.name: hex_analyze
tools.description: Architecture health check: boundary violations, dead exports, circular deps. Runs tree-sitter analysis against hexagonal import rules.

tools.name: hex_analyze_json
tools.description: Architecture health check returning raw JSON for programmatic consumption by agents and hooks.

tools.name: hex_status
tools.description: Show project status: service health, registered agents, active swarms, architecture score.

tools.name: hex_hexflo_swarm_init
tools.description: Initialize a new HexFlo swarm for coordinated multi-agent feature development. Topologies: hierarchical (default), mesh, pipeline.

tools.name: hex_hexflo_swarm_status
tools.description: Get status of all active swarms including tasks, agents, and heartbeat health.

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_create
tools.description: Create a task in a swarm. Each task maps to one adapter boundary and one git worktree.

swarm_id.description: Swarm ID to add task to

title.description: Task title — should describe the adapter-bounded work unit

assignee.description: Agent role to assign (e.g., hex-coder, integrator)

metadata.description: Task metadata (phase, feature, tier, adapter, port, worktree_branch)

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_list
tools.description: List all tasks across swarms. Optionally filter by swarm_id. Shows status, assignee, and tier.

swarm_id.description: Filter by swarm ID (omit for all swarms)

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_assign
tools.description: Assign a task to an agent. Sets status to 'in_progress' and records the agent_id. Only works on tasks with 'pending' status.

agent_id.description: Agent ID claiming this task (from hex_agent_connect registration)

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_complete
tools.description: Mark a task as completed. Always include the git commit hash in the result string.

result.description: Completion summary with commit hash (e.g., 'feat(cli-adapter): implement IWorkplanPort — commit abc1234')

tools.name: hex_hexflo_memory_store
tools.description: Store a key-value pair in persistent HexFlo memory. Scopes: global, swarm, agent. Persists across sessions.

value.description: Value to store (JSON stringified for complex objects)

tools.name: hex_hexflo_memory_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a value by key from persistent HexFlo memory. Use for session continuity and swarm state recovery.

tools.name: hex_hexflo_memory_search
tools.description: Fuzzy search persistent HexFlo memory by query string. Returns matching keys and values.

query.description: Search query (fuzzy matched against keys and values)

tools.name: hex_adr_list
tools.description: List Architecture Decision Records. Optionally filter by status: proposed, accepted, deprecated, superseded.

tools.name: hex_adr_search
tools.description: Search ADRs by keyword across titles, context, and decision sections.

tools.name: hex_adr_status
tools.description: Show detailed status of a specific ADR including cross-references and compliance.

tools.name: hex_adr_abandoned
tools.description: Find stale/abandoned ADRs that have been in 'proposed' status too long without acceptance.

days.description: Days without update to consider abandoned (default: 14)

tools.name: hex_plan_list
tools.description: List existing workplans from docs/workplans/ with step counts and completion progress.

tools.name: hex_plan_status
tools.description: Show detailed status of a specific workplan: steps, dependencies, completion, assigned agents.

tools.name: hex_plan_execute
tools.description: Start executing a workplan. Spawns agents per task, tracks progress in SpacetimeDB, enforces tier ordering.

file.description: Path to workplan JSON file (e.g., docs/workplans/feat-auth.json)

tools.name: hex_plan_pause
tools.description: Pause the currently running workplan execution. In-flight agents complete their current task but no new tasks are dispatched.

tools.name: hex_plan_resume
tools.description: Resume a paused workplan execution. Dispatches the next tier of tasks.

tools.name: hex_plan_report
tools.description: Get aggregate report for a workplan execution: phases completed, tasks by status, agent performance, gate results, duration.

tools.name: hex_plan_history
tools.description: List all workplan executions (active, completed, failed) from SpacetimeDB with timestamps and outcomes.

tools.name: hex_agent_connect
tools.description: Register this Claude Code session (or any AI agent) with hex-nexus. Returns an agentId used for heartbeats, task assignment, and fleet tracking.

name.description: Agent display name (default: auto-generated from host)

session_id.description: Claude Code session ID (stored in metadata)

tools.name: hex_agent_disconnect
tools.description: Deregister an agent from hex-nexus. Releases any assigned tasks back to the pool.

tools.name: hex_agent_list
tools.description: List all agents currently registered with hex-nexus (local + remote) with heartbeat status and assigned tasks.

tools.name: hex_nexus_status
tools.description: Check hex-nexus daemon health: uptime, SpacetimeDB connection, active subscriptions, registered projects.

tools.name: hex_nexus_start
tools.description: Start the hex-nexus daemon. Must be run from terminal, not from within MCP. Dashboard available at http://localhost:5555.

tools.name: hex_secrets_status
tools.description: Show secrets backend status: which provider is active (env, keychain, vault) and which keys are available.

tools.name: hex_secrets_has
tools.description: Check if a secret key exists without revealing its value. Safe for use in agent workflows.

key.description: Secret key name to check (e.g., ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)

tools.name: hex_inference_add
tools.description: Register an inference provider (ollama, vllm, openai-compat). Tests connectivity and discovers available models.

tools.name: hex_inference_list
tools.description: List all registered inference providers (env vars + nexus-registered) with health status.

tools.name: hex_inference_test
tools.description: Test connectivity to an inference provider. Checks health, lists models, runs a quick inference probe with latency measurement.

target.description: Provider URL or host (e.g., http://localhost:11434 or bazzite.local)

tools.name: hex_inference_bench
tools.description: Benchmark a model with hex-specific prompts (code-gen, reasoning, identity). Returns quality score, tok/s, and recommended hex agent tier.

target.description: Provider ID, model name, or URL to benchmark

tools.name: hex_inference_discover
tools.description: Auto-discover Ollama instances on localhost and LAN. Checks SpacetimeDB registry and scans common network addresses.

tools.name: hex_inference_remove
tools.description: Remove a registered inference provider by ID.

tools.name: hex_brief
tools.description: Get a developer briefing: pending decisions, recent activity, and project health summary. Ambient-first AIOS layer (ADR-2604131500).

project.description: Filter to a specific project ID

since.description: ISO-8601 timestamp — only include activity after this time

tools.name: hex_decide
tools.description: Respond to a pending decision (approve, reject, defer, or override with a value). Part of the AIOS Console layer (ADR-2604131500).

tools.name: hex_trust_show
tools.description: Show current delegation trust levels per project and scope. Part of the AIOS delegation layer (ADR-2604131500).

project.description: Filter to a specific project ID

tools.name: hex_trust_set
tools.description: Set delegation trust level for a project scope (suggest, auto, or block). Controls how much autonomy agents have (ADR-2604131500).

tools.name: hex_steer
tools.description: Send a steering directive to a project — adjusts agent behavior without interrupting work. Part of the AIOS Override layer (ADR-2604131500).

directive.description: Free-text steering directive (e.g., 'focus on tests', 'stop adding new deps')

tools.name: hex_pulse
tools.description: One-glance system pulse: active agents, pending decisions, recent completions, health. The ambient heartbeat of the AIOS (ADR-2604131500).
